## Description
What does this PR change and why?

## Skills Affected
Which skills are added, modified, or removed?

## Tradeoff Analysis
What tradeoffs does this change introduce? Are there potential downsides?

## Misuse Consideration
Could this change be misused? How is that risk mitigated?

## Test Cases
- [ ] New test cases added for new behavior
- [ ] Existing test cases still pass
- [ ] Adversarial test cases included

## Checklist
- [ ] SKILL.md follows the 15-section template
- [ ] EXAMPLES.md has 8+ examples with good/bad comparisons
- [ ] TEST_CASES.md has 10+ test cases including adversarial scenarios
- [ ] MISUSE.md identifies misuse vectors with mitigations
- [ ] Consistent with PRINCIPLES.md
- [ ] No contradictions with existing skills (or documented in compatibility-matrix.md)
- [ ] Plain, operational language (no slogans or jargon)
- [ ] Robotics notes included where relevant
